ddls:
CREATE TABLE "number_prefixes" (
  "prefix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each number prefix */,
  "prefix" TEXT /* The telephone number prefix (e.g., 684 - 248) */,
  "primary_city" TEXT /* Primary city where the number prefix is used */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company assigned the number prefix */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the number prefix is used */,
  "usage_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of usage (e.g., Landline, Cell Number) */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date when the number prefix was introduced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the prefix (e.g., active, inactive, reserved) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the prefix information was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the prefix */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the prefix is primarily used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prefix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_number_prefixes_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_number_prefixes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_number_prefixes_usage_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_type_id") REFERENCES usage_types ("usage_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the telecommunication company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the company (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the company information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_types" (
  "usage_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage type */,
  "usage_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the usage type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the usage type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the usage type is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the usage type information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary city */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the city information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or territory where the county is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the county information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "number_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation event */,
  "prefix_id" INTEGER /* ID of the number prefix being allocated */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company to which the number prefix is allocated */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the allocation was made */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the allocation becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the allocation expires (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the allocation (e.g., active, expired, pending) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the allocation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the allocation information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_number_allocations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_number_allocations_prefix_id FOREIGN KEY ("prefix_id") REFERENCES number_prefixes ("prefix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, company representative) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the user information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the access log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
